name: FAQ accordion

en.when_to_use: Use it when delivery notes, product introductions, or instructional answers need several question -> answer groups that readers can expand on demand. If every answer is short and should be compared at once, use a static Q&A list; if users must enter answers or choose options, use a form/quiz component.
en.why_valuable: A fully expanded long FAQ buries the question index, while plain links break context; this component compresses content into a scannable directory with accessible buttons, clear expanded states, and optional categories, keeping all interaction local.

data_in.note: data.items contains Q&A records. Items are grouped by the first appearance of category while preserving input order within each group; uncategorized items go under General. open:true sets an initially expanded item. allowMultiple defaults to true; when false, a local click on a new question collapses the others. Every toggle changes only aria-expanded and hidden inside its own shadow and sends no state to the host.

schema.title?: string -- title; displays "Frequently asked questions" when omitted
schema.description?: string -- FAQ scope or reading guidance
schema.allowMultiple?: boolean -- whether multiple items may be expanded at once; default true
schema.items: {question:string,answer:string,category?:string,open?:boolean}[] -- questions, answers, optional categories, and initial expanded state; displayed in input order

spec.note: Grows automatically with questions and expanded answers. After 700px the content area scrolls internally while category headings remain sticky; padding tightens on mobile. No vh or carrier measurement.

when_to_use: 需要在交付说明、产品介绍或教学回答中容纳多组“问题→答案”，并让读者按需展开时用它；若答案都很短且需要同时对照，用静态问答列表；若用户填写答案或选择选项，必须改用表单/测验组件。
why_valuable: 长篇 FAQ 全部展开会淹没问题索引，纯链接又让上下文断裂；本组件用可访问按钮、清晰的展开状态和可选分类把内容压缩成可扫读目录，交互完全留在本地。

data_in.note: data.items 是问答记录，按 category 首次出现顺序分组，同组保持输入顺序；未分类项归入 General。open:true 设置初始展开项。allowMultiple 默认 true；设为 false 时，本地点击新问题会折叠其他问题。所有切换只修改自有 shadow 内的 aria-expanded 与 hidden，不向宿主发送状态。

schema.title?: string —— 标题；省略时显示 “Frequently asked questions”
schema.description?: string —— FAQ 范围或阅读说明
schema.allowMultiple?: boolean —— 是否允许同时展开多项，默认 true
schema.items: {question:string,answer:string,category?:string,open?:boolean}[] —— 问题、答案、可选分类与初始展开状态；按输入顺序展示

spec.note: 按问题和展开答案自动增高，内容区最高 700px 后内部滚动且分类标题粘住；移动端收紧内边距。无 vh 或载体测量。

example._why: 发布流程与计费两类真实问题覆盖分类、默认展开、长短答案和单开模式，能验证本地折叠、ARIA 状态与内容滚动。

minimal.title: Workspace launch FAQ
minimal.description: What teams need to know before moving into the new workspace

items.question: When does the new workspace become available?
items.answer: The workspace opens to all team members on Monday, 27 July at 09:00 Melbourne time.

items.question: Will existing project links keep working?
items.answer: Yes. Existing links redirect automatically for 90 days. Update bookmarked admin links before that window closes.

items.question: Where can I get migration help?
items.answer: Use the #workspace-help channel during business hours. Include the project name and a screenshot of the issue.

items.question: Does the migration change our plan?
items.answer: No. Seats, billing cadence, and renewal dates stay the same.

items.question: Are guest accounts counted as paid seats?
items.answer: Guests remain free when they are limited to one project. Access to two or more projects requires a member seat.

uplink: display/local-only interaction，无 uplink；展开/折叠只改变组件 shadow 内的可见状态，不返回选择、不提交数据，也不触发宿主消息。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero imports/fetch/global footprint; click listeners bind only to owned shadow buttons; accordion rendered and toggled in verification
